name: Creamy Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups fresh or frozen unsweetened sliced rhubarb
1 recipe pastry for single crust pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw rhubarb if frozen, but do not drain.
2. Prepare and roll out the pastry for a single crust pie as directed. Line a 9-inch pie plate with the pastry. Trim and flute the edge of the pastry (do not prick the shell).
3. For the filling, combine eggs, yogurt, sugar, 3 tablespoons flour, and nutmeg in a bowl.
4. Add rhubarb (and juice if thawed) to the mixture and gently toss until coated.
5. Transfer the mixture to the prepared pastry shell.
6. In another bowl, combine 1/3 cup flour and brown sugar with butter until crumbly.
7. Stir in chopped pecans.
8. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the pie.
9. Cover the edge of the pie with foil.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 25 minutes more, or until the pie appears nearly set when gently shaken from the center. Cool on a wire rack.
11. Refrigerate within 2 hours; cover for longer storage. Makes 8 servings.
